overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking along a winding dirt path through a dark forest at night. The scene has a moody, atmospheric quality with teal-green low lighting and dense natural vegetation surrounding the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail with scattered pine trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through relatively open woodland with swords visible on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with gravel texture cutting through the grass
grassy slope with small plants and wildflowers
tall evergreen trees scattered across the landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a dirt trail through open forest terrain. The path is surrounded by grassy slopes and scattered pine trees visible in the distance. A rock outcrop sits to the left of the path as the camera follows Geralt from behind in the moonlit night.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with mixed birch and pine trees

events.description: path curves right and enters denser mixed forest with prominent white birch trees appearing on the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the path curves gently to the right through denser vegetation

entered.detail: tall birch tree with distinctive white bark and sparse branches
thick bushes and shrubs lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail curves right into a denser section of forest where a distinctive white birch tree appears on the right. The vegetation becomes thicker with dense underbrush lining the path, and the sky becomes mostly obscured by the tree canopy overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense dark forest trail with dead standing trees

events.description: ambient light decreases significantly as path enters deeply shaded forest area with thick canopy cover
passing by dead standing trees with bare trunks on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the darkest and most enclosed section of the forest path

entered.detail: bare dead trees with no leaves and visible white-gray bark
thick overhead tree cover completely blocking the night sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters the darkest part of the forest where the canopy completely blocks the sky. Dead standing trees appear on the right side of the path, and the surroundings become heavily enclosed with dense vegetation pressing close to the trail. The atmosphere is at its most ominous and isolated.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit forest that gradually transforms from an open woodland into a claustrophobic, dark thicket. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt trail flanked by grassy slopes and scattered pine trees, passing a rock outcrop under a visible night sky. As the path curves to the right, the scene shifts into a denser section of the forest where a white birch tree appears and the overhead canopy begins to obscure the light. The environment then closes in further, with the sky disappearing entirely as the camera enters the darkest part of the woods. Finally, the trail becomes heavily enclosed by dense vegetation and dead standing trees, culminating in an ominous and isolated atmosphere.
